Init misuse: methods, Go's init, bad returns, arguments.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

func main() {
	if err := run(); err != nil {
		panic(err)
	}
}
-- web/web.go --
package web

type T struct{}

//fabrik:init
func (t *T) Setup() {}

//fabrik:init
func Bad() int { return 0 }

//fabrik:init verbose
func WithArg() {}

type Dep struct{}

//fabrik:init
func Wired(d *Dep) {}
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:5:1: //fabrik:init must be on a package-level function (func Setup is a method)
  help: move the setup function out of the method set
error: web/web.go:8:1: init Bad must return nothing or error
  help: example: func InitTracing(ctx context.Context) error
error: web/web.go:11:15: //fabrik:init takes no arguments (got "verbose")
  help: example: //fabrik:init
